gotchas_discovered.description: Despite subtask-2 (spec 021 init) being marked SUCCESS in this session, the git diff shows spec 020 event-driven dispatcher fully completed with all 6 subtasks, 465 tests, and QA approval. Subtask-2 appears to be initiated AFTER spec 020 finished, not in parallel.
gotchas_discovered.consequence: Subtask-2 may have been deferred; actual implementation order was: 020 complete → 020 QA approval → then 021 spec 021 scaffolding
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Clarify spec-021 subtask breakdown; ensure Zellij detection is not blocked by 020 completion

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Manual Test Plan as Fallback, Not Primary
gotchas_discovered.description: MANUAL_TEST_PLAN.md generated because spec 020 'does not have automated testing infrastructure.' Yet build-progress.txt claims '465 tests passing' and 'All clippy and fmt checks passing.' Contradiction.
gotchas_discovered.consequence: Manual test plan may be boilerplate; actual validation happened via cargo test (465 tests), not manual checklist
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Update MANUAL_TEST_PLAN.md header to note: 'Automated tests: 465 passing. Manual plan provided for edge cases / post-release validation only.'

gotchas_discovered.description: build-progress.txt mentions '--poll-ms fallback preserved' for backward compatibility, but no explicit test case shown for fallback path
gotchas_discovered.consequence: If --poll-ms flag is invoked, code path may not have been exercised in the 465 passing tests
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Add regression test: 'cargo test test_poll_ms_legacy_mode' to ensure fallback doesn't regress

gotchas_discovered.description: qa_signoff.timestamp = '2026-03-07T06:24:00Z' but last_updated = '2026-03-07T06:24:00Z' and qa_iteration_history[0].timestamp = '2026-03-07T06:27:12.301140+00:00'. QA sign-off happened before final iteration timestamp.
gotchas_discovered.consequence: Possible timestamp ordering issue; approval may have been backdated or iteration added post-approval
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Review dispatch logic to ensure timestamps reflect actual action order; use monotonic clock if available

gotchas_discovered.description: init.sh listed as modified/created in .auto-claude/specs/021-bop-init-zellij-onboarding/ but subtask-2 claims 'detect Zellij session and write .cards/config.json' — init.sh purpose unclear
gotchas_discovered.consequence: May be script runner or onboarding harness; actual Zellij detection logic location unknown from diff
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Clarify: is init.sh the harness that calls main.rs, or is main.rs the entry point for Zellij detection?
